_note: D1 Executive Scorecard — 1 dashboard + 10 KPI definitions for Metric Studio. All read veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month (1 row/month). Phase-0 clean (summary + trend) and carry v-next fields (direction, target, comparison). Percent metrics: formatter.scale='fraction' (exec stores ratios as fractions) and threshold/target values are in DISPLAY-percent units. Thresholds/targets are demo defaults — tune against live numbers after the first pipeline run. Create the dashboard first, then each metric (its dashboards[] pins it here).

definition.description: North-star turnaround KPIs — margin, volume, cash, labor, safety. CEO / board.
Net patient revenue minus labor + supply cost, over net revenue (proxy). The turnaround north-star.
definition.sql: SELECT operating_margin_proxy AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month` WHERE month = (SELECT MAX(month) FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month`)
definition.trend_sql: SELECT FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', month) AS period, operating_margin_proxy AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month` ORDER BY month ASC LIMIT 13

definition.description: Cash collected from payers in the latest month.
definition.sql: SELECT net_patient_revenue AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month` WHERE month = (SELECT MAX(month) FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month`)
definition.trend_sql: SELECT FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', month) AS period, net_patient_revenue AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month` ORDER BY month ASC LIMIT 13

definition.description: Collected as a share of gross billed (yield on charges).
definition.sql: SELECT net_realization_pct AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month` WHERE month = (SELECT MAX(month) FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month`)
definition.trend_sql: SELECT FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', month) AS period, net_realization_pct AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month` ORDER BY month ASC LIMIT 13

definition.description: Share of claims denied by payers. A core revenue-cycle lever.
definition.sql: SELECT denial_rate AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month` WHERE month = (SELECT MAX(month) FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month`)
definition.trend_sql: SELECT FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', month) AS period, denial_rate AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month` ORDER BY month ASC LIMIT 13

definition.description: Cash-velocity proxy — lower means faster collection.
definition.sql: SELECT ar_days_proxy AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month` WHERE month = (SELECT MAX(month) FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month`)
definition.trend_sql: SELECT FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', month) AS period, ar_days_proxy AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month` ORDER BY month ASC LIMIT 13

definition.description: Agency/travel hours as a share of worked hours. The #1 margin lever.
definition.sql: SELECT agency_pct AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month` WHERE month = (SELECT MAX(month) FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month`)
definition.trend_sql: SELECT FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', month) AS period, agency_pct AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month` ORDER BY month ASC LIMIT 13

definition.description: Blended labor cost per productive hour.
definition.sql: SELECT labor_cost_per_worked_hour AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month` WHERE month = (SELECT MAX(month) FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month`)
definition.trend_sql: SELECT FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', month) AS period, labor_cost_per_worked_hour AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month` ORDER BY month ASC LIMIT 13

definition.description: Mean inpatient LOS (discharged). Throughput + cost driver.
definition.sql: SELECT alos AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month` WHERE month = (SELECT MAX(month) FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month`)
definition.trend_sql: SELECT FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', month) AS period, alos AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month` ORDER BY month ASC LIMIT 13

definition.description: Average hours boarded in the ED awaiting an inpatient bed. Access + safety signal.
definition.sql: SELECT ed_boarding_avg AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month` WHERE month = (SELECT MAX(month) FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month`)
definition.trend_sql: SELECT FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', month) AS period, ed_boarding_avg AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month` ORDER BY month ASC LIMIT 13

definition.description: Severe/death-severity safety events this month. The board's quality north-star.
definition.sql: SELECT serious_safety_events AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month` WHERE month = (SELECT MAX(month) FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month`)
definition.trend_sql: SELECT FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', month) AS period, serious_safety_events AS value FROM `veridian_metrics.exec_kpi_month` ORDER BY month ASC LIMIT 13
